other_observers: Dave Leatherman Dotti Russell; -original finder and suggested probable identity -the other observers quickly confirmed
specific_location: 5 miles south of the south edge of Lamar on US Hwy 287 and about half a mile to the west - in the back yard of the farm house
description: -warm brown head, back and upper breast -rusty orange sides -white belly -no spots on wings  -missing the typical one white wing spot -reddish eye -dark bill -larger than a sparrow  -long tailBehaviors: -first appeared at water feature -scratched through debris under euonymous bush -also foraged for something in grass -assumed it was the "miller moths" which were abundant and many birds were eating themCall: n/aPlumage: maybe not quite full adult
photographer: Photographer: Jane Stulp, Jane Stulp, Jane Stulp
